languages.text: Устройство издает едва слышный щелчок. Теперь оно медленно заглохнет, оборвав и процесс восстановления Экзальта, и его жизнь.

traits.locale_text: Устройство издает едва слышный щелчок. Теперь оно медленно заглохнет, оборвав и процесс восстановления Экзальта, и его жизнь.

languages.text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.
languages.original_text: Устройство издает едва слышный щелчок. Теперь оно медленно заглохнет, оборвав и процесс восстановления Экзальта, и его жизнь.

traits.locale_text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.
The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.
The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.

languages.text: Aus dem Gerät ertönt ein kaum hörbares Klicken. Es kommt langsam zum Stillstand und beendet den Regenerationsprozess und das Leben von Exalt-117.
languages.original_text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.

traits.locale_text: Aus dem Gerät ertönt ein kaum hörbares Klicken. Es kommt langsam zum Stillstand und beendet den Regenerationsprozess und das Leben von Exalt-117.

languages.text: 装置发出一声几乎听不见的轻响。随后，它慢慢停转，尊使-117的修复进程和他的生命也一并终止。
languages.original_text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.

traits.locale_text: 装置发出一声几乎听不见的轻响。随后，它慢慢停转，尊使-117的修复进程和他的生命也一并终止。

languages.text: L'appareil émet un cliquetis à peine audible. Puis, il cesse de fonctionner, mettant un terme à la régénération – et à l'existence – d'Exalt-117.
languages.original_text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.

traits.locale_text: L'appareil émet un cliquetis à peine audible. Puis, il cesse de fonctionner, mettant un terme à la régénération – et à l'existence – d'Exalt-117.

languages.text: El dispositivo emite un chasquido casi inaudible y se va ralentizando hasta detenerse, poniendo fin al proceso de recuperación de Exaltado-117 y, con ello, a su vida.
languages.original_text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.

traits.locale_text: El dispositivo emite un chasquido casi inaudible y se va ralentizando hasta detenerse, poniendo fin al proceso de recuperación de Exaltado-117 y, con ello, a su vida.

languages.text: Cihaz, zorlukla duyulabilen bir tık sesi çıkarıyor. Şimdi yavaşça durarak hem Yüce-117'nin iyileşme sürecini hem de hayatını sonlandırıyor.
languages.original_text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.

traits.locale_text: Cihaz, zorlukla duyulabilen bir tık sesi çıkarıyor. Şimdi yavaşça durarak hem Yüce-117'nin iyileşme sürecini hem de hayatını sonlandırıyor.

languages.text: 装置からかすかに聞こえるクリック音が鳴り、ゆっくりと停止する。エクサルト117の回復過程と彼の命は共に止まった。
languages.original_text: The device emits a barely audible click. Now it slowly stalls, ending both Exalt-117's recovery process and his life.

traits.locale_text: 装置からかすかに聞こえるクリック音が鳴り、ゆっくりと停止する。エクサルト117の回復過程と彼の命は共に止まった。
